content: The incomplete, search-dependent knowledge structure that surrounds both the 2025 self-supervised world model memory agent and the generic 'agent' topic can be reframed as a self-supervised active learning challenge: the incomplete search traces act as a 'partial world memory' that a curiosity-driven agent can use to self-supervise filling in missing knowledge to improve its own future reasoning. This turns the incomplete input data about agents into a test case for the very agent architecture being discussed.
